items.title: There Will Be a Scientific Theory of Deep Learning
items.summary: In this paper, we make the case that a scientific theory of deep learning is emerging. By this we mean a theory which characterizes important properties and statistics of the training process, hidden representations, final weights, and performance of neural networks. items.title: ML supports existence of unrecognized transient astronomical phenomena
items.summary: Transient, star-like point sources that appear and vanish over short timescales are described in astronomical images prior to launch of Sputnik.
